scripts.build:web: pnpm --filter @seminar/contracts build && pnpm --filter @seminar/utils build && pnpm --filter @seminar/ui build && pnpm --filter @seminar/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm -r run lint && pnpm run lint:functions
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @seminar/contracts run typecheck && pnpm --filter @seminar/utils run typecheck && pnpm --filter @seminar/ui run typecheck && pnpm --filter @seminar/web run typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:functions
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @seminar/contracts build && pnpm --filter @seminar/utils build && pnpm --filter @seminar/ui build && pnpm --filter @seminar/web dev
scripts.dev:pages: pnpm run build:web && wrangler pages dev apps/web/dist --local
